title: Kaun Kare Kurbanie
subTitle: Arjun Singh, a police inspector, lives peacefully with his family in Mumbai, until an alarming case of harassment and murder turns his life upside down.

title: Khel
subTitle: Three fraudsters trick a rich elderly woman, Sulakshana, who is desperately looking for her long-lost grandchild, in order to acquire her estate and property.

title: Satya
subTitle: Satya gets acquainted with Bhiku Mhatre, an underworld boss, while serving a term in jail and joins his gang. When he falls in love with Vidya, he is forced to choose between his job and his love.

title: Khel
subTitle: Three fraudsters trick a rich elderly woman, Sulakshana, who is desperately looking for her long-lost grandchild, in order to acquire her estate and property.

title: Anokhi Ada
subTitle: Lalaji and Gupta, two business partners, take their relationship to the next level when their children, Rakesh and Neeta, marry each other. However, chaos ensues when Lalaji helps Gopal, a stranger.

title: Laila
subTitle: Deshraj and Leela's love thrives under the shadows of enmity between two Rajput families. This triggers a clash of expectations, egos, and bullets, placing several lives in danger.

title: Aao Pyaar Karen
subTitle: Just like his father before him, wealthy Raja wants to marry a poor girl, but his grandmother opposes the match. The cycle of estrangement repeats itself as he chooses love over money.

title: Dhadkan
subTitle: Anjali and Dev's love story faces a harsh twist when Anjali is forced to marry Ram. Years later, Dev returns to rekindle their romance, only to find that Anjali has grown to love her husband.

title: Taqdeer Ka Tamasha
subTitle: An officer has a strained relationship with his brother Satya, a criminal. While attempting to gather evidence against a goon, he meets his sibling. But, they are not aware of the gangster's secrets.

title: Shehzaade
subTitle: Suraj, a justice-loving man, must face a series of obstacles when he discovers his widowed mother's affair with a former prisoner.

title: Shehzaade
subTitle: Suraj, a justice-loving man, must face a series of obstacles when he discovers his widowed mother's affair with a former prisoner.

title: Haathon Ki Lakeeren
subTitle: A widow fears the imminent loss of her adopted child when his biological parents unexpectedly arrive and demand her to return him.

title: Kundan
subTitle: Thakur Shamsher Singh, a wealthy criminal, tries to befriend a newly-appointed police officer in order to gain his favour, only to find out that the policeman is immune to his tactics.

title: Kaali Topi Laal Rumaal
subTitle: Commando Vijay arrests a terrorist, Master DD. However, he realises that Master DD is just a pawn and tries to find the real culprit.

title: Kahani Kismat Ki
subTitle: After his release from jail, a criminal tries to make an honest living. However, his plans go awry when a woman claims that he is her husband and later he is arrested for murder.

title: Juaari
subTitle: The struggle against a dangerous gambling lord tests Dharam Singh and Vijay as they navigate crime, deception and violence to protect the innocent and reclaim what was lost.

title: Shaktiman
subTitle: When Vicky and Amar get switched at birth, one grows up to be a police officer and the other a murderer. Things take a turn when their parents learn the truth.

title: Kudrat Ka Kanoon
subTitle: When the good doctor Vijay is falsely accused and imprisoned, his wife and daughter, desperately seeking justice, are terrorised and slandered by the harsh eyes of the society.

title: Insaniyat
subTitle: Inspector Amar must unite two rival crime bosses from different religious backgrounds to fight terrorism. In the process, he discovers the personal cost of being an honest cop.

title: Insaniyat
subTitle: Inspector Amar must unite two rival crime bosses from different religious backgrounds to fight terrorism. In the process, he discovers the personal cost of being an honest cop.

title: Parinati
subTitle: Ganesh, a potter living in a remote village of Rajasthan with his wife, Kurjan, and their son Laxman, is asked to make a choice for the sake of Laxman's bright future.
